summary: Plan-only classification for cluster gitcrawl-30-bulk-plan-20260615-a. The job-provided security-signal refs are quarantined with route_security item-by-item. The remaining non-security items split into distinct Telegram subfamilies: multi-agent targeting context (#56692/#72510), group misdelivery and delivery diagnostics (#79308/#84154/#85654/#86262), and bot-self reply context under allowlist visibility (#82002/#82079). No close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned.
